problem id: 37cbea46
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND SHR(1)) XOR NOT SHR(2)

examples:
  00111001 -> 11111101
  10000111 -> 10011111
  11000011 -> 10101111
  01011100 -> 11101110
  01111110 -> 11111111
  00001001 -> 11111101
  00111011 -> 11111101
  01101111 -> 11110111
  11111100 -> 11111110

query: 00111010
predicted answer: 11111101
